M
Growth AI · Overview
High confidenceAll channels5 min ago
Paid ROAS drop
Meta CPA spiked 18% — creative fatiguing
Shopping campaign creative is 30 days old. ROAS dropped to 2.8x with Meta overclaiming 31%. 2 campaigns below break-even.
Email win
Email recovered $4,200 from abandoned carts
Post-purchase flow drove 3 new VIP customers (now 303). Activate browse abandonment for est. $18K/mo more.
Flow decay
Welcome flow open rate dropped 8% — subject stale
Refresh subject line. SEO content gaps identified: 4 pages missing including Birthday Flowers (12.4K searches/mo).

Is your growth working
Revenue vs efficiency · trailing 12 months
$314K↑ 41% VS LAST YEAR
Solid = this year · ghost = last year · efficiency = revenue earned per $1 of ad spend
Compounding
RevenueEfficiency (MER)Last year

Revenue is up 41% over last year and the efficiency line is holding above 4.0× as you scale — you're compounding, not buying growth. The one watch: MER dipped in Nov–Dec when paid spend outran return; it has since recovered.
